title: BandMathRecipe
description:
A SEPAL Band Math recipe. Apply mathematical expressions or per-pixel reducers (sum, min, max, mean, etc.) to one or more input images and emit user-named output bands.

**What this recipe is for.** Compute derived bands from existing imagery: vegetation indices (NDVI = (nir - red)/(nir + red)), forest masks (canopy_cover > 30), composite metrics, ratios, etc. The recipe is a thin wrapper over `ee.Image.expression()` plus `ee.Reducer.<reducer>` aggregation across selected bands.

**Pipeline.** (1) Load each `inputImagery.images[*]` (recipe ref or asset), keeping only its `includedBands`. (2) For each `calculations.calculations[*]`, evaluate either an `EXPRESSION` (math expression referencing input image names) or a `FUNCTION` (apply a reducer across `usedBands`). (3) Stack the calculations as bands and surface them via `outputBands.outputImages`.

**AOI semantics.** No separate AOI field — the AOI is implicit in the input imagery.

**Fields the LLM must populate.** Everything: `inputImagery.images` (≥ 1 source image), `calculations.calculations` (≥ 1 expression or reducer), and `outputBands.outputImages` (≥ 1 entry naming which calculation outputs to expose). The defaults are empty arrays — there is no sensible default for any of these, the LLM builds the entire computation from the user's stated intent.

bandNames.description: Synthesized band-name cache (maintained by the GUI's syncBandNames action). Cosmetic — the LLM does not need to set this.

inputImagery.title: BandMathInputImagery
inputImagery.description: Source images that calculations can reference. Each image gets a stable `imageId` (UUID) and a user-chosen `name` — calculations reference them by `name` in expressions or by `imageId` in usedBands.

imageId.description: Stable UUID for this image entry; calculations reference it via `usedBands[*].imageId`.

name.description: Identifier used in `EXPRESSION` calculations (e.g. `i1.nir - i1.red`). Must match `^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,29}$` (max 30 chars; the GUI's per-name regex).

id.description: SEPAL recipe id or EE asset id.

bands.description: Per-band metadata loaded from the source. The LLM does not synthesize this; pull it from the loaded source state.

name.description: Band name as it appears on the source image.

includedBands.description: Subset of source bands actually exposed to calculations. Calculations can only reference bands that appear here.

calculations.title: BandMathCalculations
calculations.description: Math expressions or reducer-based aggregations producing derived bands.

calculation.title: BandMathCalculation
calculation.description:
A single derived-band calculation. Two modes:

- `EXPRESSION` — `ee.Image().expression(expression, {<imageName>: eeImage, ...})`. The expression references input/calculation images by their `name` (e.g. `i1.nir`). Built-in math constants `E`, `LN10`, `LN2`, `LOG10E`, `LOG2E`, `PI`, `SQRT1_2`, `SQRT2` are available.
- `FUNCTION` — apply an `ee.Reducer.<reducer>` per-pixel across the bands listed in `usedBands` (which may span multiple images).

imageId.description: Stable UUID for this calculation; later calculations may reference its output by name like any input image.

name.description: Identifier — must NOT collide with any other calculation or input image `name`, and must NOT match a reserved math function name (sqrt, log, etc.).

dataType.description: Output dtype. `auto` (default) preserves EE's inferred type; specific values cast via `ee.Image.cast`.

imageId.description: imageId of an input image OR another calculation.

usedBands.description: Bands available to the expression / reducer. Required for both EXPRESSION (used to validate reference targets) and FUNCTION (the bands stacked into the reducer input).

expression.description: Math expression for `EXPRESSION` calculations. Required when type=EXPRESSION. Reference bands as `<imageName>.<bandName>`. EE expression syntax: arithmetic (`+ - * / %`), comparison, conditional, and standard math functions (`sqrt`, `log`, `exp`, `min`, `max`, `pow`, `abs`, etc.).

reducer.description: EE reducer name (e.g. `sum`, `min`, `max`, `mean`, `median`, `mode`, `stdDev`, `variance`, `count`) for `FUNCTION` calculations. Required when type=FUNCTION.

includedBands.description: Output band(s) produced by this calculation. For single-output calculations (e.g. a reducer), one entry; for expression outputs that produce multiple renamed bands, multiple entries.

bandName.description: Optional override for the calculation's output band name (single-band case).

bandRenameStrategy.description: How to rename multiple input bands into output bands when the expression operates on a multi-band input. PREFIX adds a string before each band name; SUFFIX appends; REGEX runs a search/replace using `regex` and `bandRename`.

outputBands.title: BandMathOutputBands
outputBands.description: Selects which calculation outputs (and which of their bands) are exposed by the recipe, with optional rename. Bands not listed here are dropped from the final image.

imageId.description: Calculation imageId whose output is exposed.

name.description: Source band name within the calculation.

outputName.description: Optional rename for the recipe's final output. Must match `^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,29}$` and be unique across all output bands.

defaultOutputName.description: Fallback when outputName is unset; same constraints.
